0.0.1.name: com.basis.pooltable
0.0.1.description: A working pool / billiards table you can drop into a Basis world — a community port.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.addon.snapcontrols
0.0.1.description: Add-on snap-detent controls for Basis worlds: rotary knobs, levers, switches, and per-detent activation targets driven by snap-point markers.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.developer.recorder
0.0.1.description: Records the local humanoid avatar's pose to disk every frame and converts recordings into Unity humanoid AnimationClips. Split out of the Basis framework Developer tab.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.developer.exceptions
0.0.1.description: Captures exceptions and errors, stores crash reports across sessions and replays them on reconnect, uploads them to the server, and hosts the in-app bug-report form. Split out of the framework.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.provider.servers
0.0.1.description: Optional Servers menu panel for Basis: the server directory, connect, and host UI built on the framework's BasisConnectionService. Remove to ship a Basis app without a Servers panel.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.imagepickup
0.0.1.description: Drag and drop a PNG onto the window to spawn a networked, grabbable image pickup. Bytes are relayed peer-to-peer (or via the server as a pure relay) and never stored server-side.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.vehicles
0.0.1.description: General-purpose networked vehicle system for Basis: bodies, wheels, thrusters, hover thrusters, steering, gimbaled parts, pilot seats, and engine audio. Includes land + space example scenes.

0.0.1.name: com.basis.examples
0.0.1.description: Example content for the Basis framework: demo scenes, interactable prefabs, a mirror, seats, pickups, and sample scripts to learn from and build on.
